name: Pre-existing shoulder issue worsened by site accident in Ogden—what happens?

mainEntity.name: Pre-existing shoulder issue worsened by site accident in Ogden—what happens?

acceptedAnswer.description: **You're covered if work aggravated it; prove via medical opinion.** Utah comp includes aggravation of pre-existing conditions.[4] Key factors: (1) Doctors link worsening to incident; (2) insurers deny claiming prior cause; (3) third-party fault unaffected; (4) comparative rules apply.[1][2] Get specialist report, appeal denials, use lawyer for causation proof. Aggravation claims win with solid medicals.
